about.title: Law and strategic defense tailored to today's legal and social landscape.
about.description: Luna Legal Lab emerged from the evolution of traditional legal practice into a model designed for today's legal and technological challenges.
paragraphs: The proposition is simple: measured, strategic, and contemporary legal counsel for individuals, professionals, and organizations that require clear answers to the real issues of our time.
Today, defense can no longer be confined to the courtroom. Clients need a strategic response across multiple arenas: the media, society, reputation, and digital environments.

values.title: Criminal law rigor
values.text: Without losing the essence of classical defense, with a strong focus on procedure, strategy, and client protection.

values.title: Technological and media insight
values.text: A real understanding of the digital context to address reputation, electronic evidence, platforms, data, and Artificial Intelligence.

values.title: Clear communication
values.text: Direct guidance, informed decisions, and close support throughout the entire process. We operate as one team.

practiceAreas.title: Criminal and Corporate Law
practiceAreas.description: A focused practice where law, business, and technology intersect directly.

items.title: Criminal Law
items.text: Criminal defense and strategic litigation in complex proceedings, with comprehensive protection of rights, reputation, and legal certainty.

items.title: Cybercrime
items.text: Defense and legal counsel in cybercrime and complex digital disputes. Legal assistance in online fraud, unlawful access, impersonation, digital harassment, and investigations involving electronic evidence.

items.title: Corporate Law - Compliance
items.text: Corporate counsel on compliance, digital risks, technology contracts, and corporate criminal liability.

items.title: Artificial Intelligence
items.text: Counsel on Artificial Intelligence, governance, risk prevention, liability, and the legal integration of automated systems in corporate and public environments.

method.title: Strategic vision for a complete defense.
method.description: Each matter is examined from a legal standpoint to provide a clear and precise picture. A strategy is then structured across three distinct layers: technical defense, reputation, and communication.

steps.title: Legal Analysis
steps.text: Each matter is examined in depth to identify facts, risks, legal scenarios, and reputational exposure.

steps.title: Integrated Strategy
steps.text: A roadmap is built across three coordinated fronts: technical defense, reputation, and communication.

steps.title: Execution
steps.text: Rigorous implementation with continuous follow-up, informed decision-making, and strategic adaptation at every stage.

imagePlaceholder.title: Dr. Eduardo R. Luna Álvarez
imagePlaceholder.text: Specialist in strategic criminal defense, with experience in cybercrime, artificial intelligence, and high-complexity matters.

aboutLawyer.title: Dr. Eduardo R. Luna Álvarez
paragraphs: Doctor of Law and criminologist specialized in artificial intelligence, cybercrime, and neuroscience. Dr. Luna is a leading figure in criminal defense in complex cases with a high media profile.

He practices as a criminal defense lawyer, with a focus on criminal law, cybercrime, and the new challenges arising from the use of artificial intelligence systems. His academic background includes a Master's Degree in Security and Security Management, a Doctorate in Law from the University of the Balearic Islands, and a second doctorate currently underway in Neuroscience and Psychology.

He combines his legal practice with academic work as an Associate Professor at the University of the Balearic Islands, as well as specialized training for members of the State Security Forces and Corps through the Balearic School of Public Administration. He also serves on consultative bodies and advisory boards for various organizations and institutions.
Eduardo is a regular contributor to various media outlets, where he carries out public-facing legal outreach on matters related to criminal law.

He has completed international research stays at the Università degli Studi Guglielmo Marconi (Rome) and is the author of several legal monographs and numerous scientific articles published in high-impact journals, primarily in the fields of criminal procedural law, technological evidence, and artificial intelligence.
In recognition of his professional career, he was awarded the 2021 National Ley Award for Best Criminal Law Lawyer.
pillars: Opinions and expert reports for public institutions and police forces.
Global criminal defense with a specialization in high-complexity matters.
Corporate defense and counsel to boards of directors and professional organizations.
